issue_title: Area Chart color turns black when Gradient is On and X & Y axis are off
issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**
I wanted an area chart with nothing except the graph. So that means, no labels, no axis, no titles, no legend, etc. 

But when I turn off both axis, the gradient turns the graph black.

If you resize anything it gets painted again (except the timeline if you have it activat
test_description_zh: 创建一个面积图（Area Chart），启用渐变（gradient=true），同时关闭 X 轴和 Y 轴（xAxis=false, yAxis=false），隐藏图例、标签和标题等所有附属元素，观察面积图的渲染颜色是否正常。
expected_result_zh: 面积图应以正确的主题/配色渐变色渲染填充区域，颜色显示正常，不应出现整个图表区域变黑的情况。在不调整窗口大小的前提下，初次渲染即应呈现正确的渐变色彩。
